svg.title: Pred-Market V1 End-to-End Architecture
svg.desc: A complex system architecture for a V1 prediction market platform with market creation, approval, trading, order matching, collateral, settlement, wallets, risk, admin, and observability.
svg.text: Kalshi/Polymarket-style binary prediction market: market approval, YES/NO order books, matching, collateral, settlement, wallets, risk controls, admin, and analytics
1. Discover market and view implied probability
3. Place limit/market order on YES or NO
4. Track fills, open orders, positions, P&L
5. Sell before close or wait for settlement
YES price + NO price approximately equals payout
Platform matches users, not bookmaker risk
payout unit, tick size, min order, market close, settlement rule
Any state -> Admin Halt / Compliance Lock
For payout P, executed YES price + executed NO price = P
Matched fills are fully collateralized before confirmation
B wants 2 NO @ ₹25 -> no match, waits
E buys 2 NO @ ₹43 -> A fully filled
B remains open until YES @ ₹48 arrives
4. Admin or automated rule resolves outcome
- every trade has balanced ledger entries
Market is liquid when users can enter/exit quickly
at prices close to fair value, with low slippage.
- max order size and daily exposure limits

User suggests market -> automated policy checks -> admin approval -> contract is listed -> traders place YES/NO orders -> matching engine creates fully collateralized fills -> users can exit before close -> market closes -> oracle evidence collected -> outcome resolved -> payouts credited -> analytics/risk models updated
Critical V1 boundary: the platform is an exchange-style matcher and ledger, not a bookmaker that takes directional risk against users.
trades feed volume, price, liquidity analytics
resolution and payout events update risk controls
liquidity signals influence market promotion and maker incentives
V1 goal: fully collateralized binary exchange with clear market rules, fair matching, safe settlement, and operational controls
